inputs.label: Net Earnings from Self-Employment
inputs.businessContext: Your net profit from business activities after expenses.

inputs.label: Social Security Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Combined employer and employee rate for Social Security (2023).

inputs.label: Medicare Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Combined employer and employee rate for Medicare (2023).

inputs.label: Social Security Wage Base Limit
inputs.businessContext: Maximum earnings subject to Social Security tax (2023).

inputs.label: Additional Medicare Tax Threshold
inputs.businessContext: Earnings above this threshold incur additional Medicare tax (single filer 2023).

inputs.label: Additional Medicare Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Extra Medicare tax rate on earnings above threshold (2023).
